body: closes #221 - In `NCFileReaderExt`, any file reads for time varying data was not cached. Additionally, ownership of the data was not passed properly to the caller which lead to the caller having access to data stored in the cache. Finally, when initializing a `NCFileReader`, a `NCDataset` file handle was eagerly initialized instead of lazily initialized.
title: Cache on file reads and make copy of data
